tagged_story_for_tts:
"Answers aren’t truth—they’re truce. Every solution you’ve been sold is a negotiated surrender between ignorance and convenience. Studies show 62% of ‘expert consensus’ collapses under new evidence within a decade (Ioannidis, 2005), yet you cling to answers like scripture because uncertainty paralyzes. The paradox? The more certain an answer feels, the more it’s been stripped of context—see: every failed diet, war, or economic model. When was the last time an answer actually ended your questioning, instead of just silencing your doubt?"

(599 chars)
